primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that activates a receptor or pathway.
evidence: assess differences in the proteomic composition of CM during natural ovulatory cycles obtained from intrauterine insemination (IUI) cycles and in vitro fertilization (IVF) cycles with controlled ovarian hyperstimulation
IVF-stimulated cycles represent a cervical mucus “model system” in which hormonal medication is administered

stimulated IVF cycle using recombinant follicle-stimulating hormone (r-FSH), follitropin-alpha (Gonal-F, Merck Europe B.V., Amsterdam, The Netherlands) in combination with a gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH) agonist (Diphereline, Ipsen Pharma, Boulogne-Billancourt, France) or antagonist (Cetrotide, Merck Europe B. V., Amsterdam, The Netherlands)

attributes.agent: recombinant follicle-stimulating hormone (r-FSH), follitropin-alpha (Gonal-F), GnRH agonist (Diphereline), or GnRH antagonist (Cetrotide)
evidence: stimulated IVF cycle using recombinant follicle-stimulating hormone (r-FSH), follitropin-alpha (Gonal-F, Merck Europe B.V., Amsterdam, The Netherlands) in combination with a gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH) agonist (Diphereline, Ipsen Pharma, Boulogne-Billancourt, France) or antagonist (Cetrotide, Merck Europe B. V., Amsterdam, The Netherlands)

attributes.route_or_context: single injection to trigger ovulation in IVF group
evidence: a single injection of 7500 IU of human chorionic gonadotropin (Ovitrelle, Merck Europe B.V., Amsterdam, The Netherlands) was administered

attributes.route_or_context: periovulatory period / time of ovum pick-up
evidence: Cervical mucus sampling was performed by aspiration immediately before the IUI procedure
Cervical mucus sampling was performed just before ovum pick-up

replicate_hints: the counts of peptides and proteins were then averaged over files representing three technical replicates to obtain one value per biological sample

evidence: assess differences in the proteomic composition of CM during natural ovulatory cycles obtained from intrauterine insemination (IUI) cycles and in vitro fertilization (IVF) cycles with controlled ovarian hyperstimulation
Differential expression analysis revealed 199 proteins enriched in IUI samples and 422 enriched in IVF

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly uses label-free quantification (LFQ) based on ion intensity and a DDA-like acquisition (TopSpeed method on Orbitrap Exploris 480).
The study explicitly uses label-free quantification (LFQ) based on ion intensity and a DDA-like acquisition (TopSpeed method on Orbitrap Exploris 480).
